title: Usopp Hears the Worst
description: The crew splits up in Water Seven, exchanging treasure and discovering the city’s craftsmen, money, and hidden dangers.
scene: Across pages 17, this part follows Luffy, Nami, Usopp, Zoro, Sanji. The crew splits up in Water Seven, exchanging treasure and discovering the city’s craftsmen, money, and hidden dangers.
summary: The crew splits up in Water Seven, exchanging treasure and discovering the city’s craftsmen, money, and hidden dangers.
